title: tetraphylloides roseus
intro: Tetraphylloides roseus, also known as Przewalski rose, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family of Saxifragaceae. It is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion, due to its bioactive compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids. In traditional Chinese medicine, Tetraphylloides roseus can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and capsules, to treat different health conditions.
